# PERF-019 positive: range over slice of large structs by value
lang: go
file: PERF-019-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

type Record struct {
	ID   int64
	Blob [256]byte
	Meta [1024]byte
}

func processRecords(records []Record) {
	for _, record := range records {
		_ = processRecord(record)
	}
}

func processRecord(r Record) int64 { return r.ID }
